title: ThermalBridgeIteration
description: ThermalBridgeIteration: Describe a single PSI Value to use for thermal bridges within the SAP context.

Values.description: A collection of Thermal Bridge Values to group as a single iteration for parametrics.

Name.description: Provide the name of this iteration. The name should be unique across all iterations in your model, and should match any coordination with other models (over heating, daylighting, etc.) you may be running parametrics on.

Prefix.description: What value should be used to prefix the name of this iteration when combining with other iterations.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
